caption: The video captures a scene of a man speaking into a microphone while standing behind a podium, addressing an audience seated in front of him. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background. The man is wearing glasses and a white shirt with a black vest that has intricate designs. He gestures with his right hand as he speaks, indicating an engaging presentation or speech. The audience, consisting of several individuals with their backs to the camera, listens attentively. The atmosphere suggests a formal event, possibly a lecture, seminar, or community meeting. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, hinting at the organization or context of the event.
